creator: bh@famille-huck.fr
text:
Dear all,

I've the exactly same error while trying to install Bacula from Ports.

I'm running in a TrueNAS jail FreeBSD Bacula 13.1-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p7 n245428-4dfb91682c1 TRUENAS amd64

I don't understand the comment "No problem anymore, perl builds just fine afterwards."

What have you done?

Cheers

R.
